---
title: "Letters and Correspondence of J. H. Newman during his Life in the English Church ed. Anne Mozley"
---

## Letters and Correspondence of J. H. Newman during his Life in the English Church ed. Anne Mozley

**Author:** The Rev. John Henry Newman
**Date:** 1891
**Imprint:** London: Longman

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
